ddls:
CREATE TABLE "solar_plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solar plant */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the solar plant is located */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the solar plant */,
  "installed_capacity_mw" REAL /* Total installed capacity of the plant in megawatts (MW) */,
  "average_mw_per_plant" REAL /* Average power output per plant in megawatts (MW) */,
  "generation_gwh" REAL /* Total energy generated by the solar plant in gigawatt-hours (GWh) */,
  "plant_type" INTEGER /* Type of the solar plant (foreign key to plant_types) */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date when the plant was commissioned */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the plant (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the plant's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the plant's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solar_plants_plant_type FOREIGN KEY ("plant_type") REFERENCES plant_types ("plant_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solar_plants_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state name */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the state (e.g., West, Southwest) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" INTEGER /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "average_sun_hours_per_day" REAL /* Average number of sunlight hours per day in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar plant for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were recorded */,
  "generation_mwh" REAL /* Energy generated by the plant on that date in megawatt-hours (MWh) */,
  "efficiency_percentage" REAL /* Efficiency percentage of the solar plant for that date */,
  "maintenance_flag" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the plant was under maintenance on the recorded date */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record for the same date (foreign key to weather_data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES solar_plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the weather data was recorded */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the weather was recorded */,
  "temperature_celsius" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "solar_radiation_kwh_m2" REAL /* Solar radiation received on that date in kilowatt-hours per square meter (kWh/m²) */,
  "wind_speed_m_per_s" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "humidity_percentage" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "cloud_cover_percentage" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar plant that was serviced */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance work performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the maintenance work */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector who performed the maintenance */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES solar_plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment record */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar plant receiving the investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "amount_invested" REAL /* Amount of money invested in the solar plant */,
  "investment_type" INTEGER /* Type of investment (foreign key to investment_types) */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Estimated return on investment */,
  "investment_status" TEXT /* Status of the investment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES solar_plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_investment_type FOREIGN KEY ("investment_type") REFERENCES investment_types ("investment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_types" (
  "investment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment type */,
  "expected_payback_period" INTEGER /* Expected payback period in years */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the investment (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_types" (
  "plant_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant type */,
  "average_lifespan_years" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the plant type in years */,
  "maintenance_frequency_months" INTEGER /* Recommended maintenance frequency in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_type_id")
)
